nodes.name: data-model.md
nodes.summary: Defines the intermediate and output data types for the pipeline-core feature, including FilterResult, ExtractionResult, PopulationResult, PipelineRunRecord, the REPLACED_BY cross-product derivation rule, artifact key format, and retry constants.

nodes.name: plan.md
nodes.summary: Implementation plan for the pipeline-core feature detailing module responsibilities, tech choices, LLM provider factory design, artifact caching conditions, structured output fallback, entityClassification derivation, and the runs/ directory layout.

nodes.name: quickstart.md
nodes.summary: Quick local-run guide for the pipeline-core feature covering required environment variables, dry-run invocation with the CLI entry point, artifact verification, and how to bypass the artifact cache with --force-llm.

nodes.name: spec.md
nodes.summary: Feature specification for the pipeline-core module with three user stories (process framework changes, idempotent graph population, dry-run and caching), 18 numbered functional requirements, and measurable success criteria.

nodes.name: tasks.md
nodes.summary: Ordered implementation task list for pipeline-core organized into six phases (setup, foundational, US1, US2, US3, polish) with 30 numbered tasks, parallelism markers, user story annotations, and explicit checkpoint gates between phases.

nodes.name: verification-protocol.md
nodes.summary: Eight-level end-to-end verification protocol for pipeline-core, progressing from static import checks and CLI structure through artifact cache validation, graph connection tests, full dry-run, live graph write, idempotency proof, and --skip-existing behavior.
